notes: SHIP v1.14.305 - FIX: N-10 (.303) no-result recovery was INVERTED. Caught by verifying the .302/.303/.304 stack: a browser render (localhost) + an adversarial verification workflow both confirmed it as a BLOCKER. ref_filterCards() had `if (nr) nr.hidden = (shown === 0)` where shown counts MATCHING cards and CSS .rf-noresult[hidden]{display:none}: so a genuine 0-match query HID the 'No tool matches' panel (blank grid, no recovery) while any state with >=1 visible card SHOWED it - and because showMode('ref')/ref_showGrid() call ref_filterCards('') on entry/Back (shown=7), the panel wrongly rendered under all 7 cards on EVERY Crash Cart open (below the fold). One-char-class fix: `nr.hidden = (shown !== 0)` (hide when results exist, show only on true 0-match). No other change; three-stamp .304->.305; ?legacy byte-identical. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): Crash Cart landing shows the 7 cards with NO stray 'No tool matches' panel; type a no-match query (e.g. 'zzq') -> 'No tool matches' + Clear appears; Clear (or native x) restores all 7. NOTE - stack verification also surfaced (NOT shipped here, owner's call): (A) PRE-EXISTING BUG - `--teal` is undefined on :root (only under #forge3d-sheet L8867 / #boot L11248), so #pg-cmd .tile.hot-teal (L9182, toggled live on the SCANNED tile by cmd_telemetry L19680 once a scan happens today) + the SHARED platform card (L19394/L19443) build --tc/--rfac from var(--teal) with no fallback -> invalid -> the tile's glass HOUSING collapses (background transparent, box-shadow none). One-line canonical fix: add `--teal:#1fffd0` to :root (Design-Law-5 value). (B) EFFICACY no-op - .302's black-glass + much of .304's glow-strip edited the BASE #pg-cmd .lens/.stat/.nba rules, but body.rd #pg-cmd .nba/.lens/.stat overrides (L11533/11829/11844, from .292/.198) WIN under body.rd -> those Command changes largely do not paint; the device pass will see little Command change. Neither (A) nor (B) is a defect introduced by the stack; awaiting owner direction. NEXT: N-11 Work Active-Workspace recon.
